- Python 3.10+ (3.11 recommended; `match/case` requires ≥ 3.10) + `dataclasses` (stdlib), `abc` (stdlib), `datetime` (stdlib), `platform` (stdlib) — no third-party runtime libraries (001-java-to-python-migration)

tests/
